question: Will the S&P 500 be above 6924.9999 on Apr 10, 2026 at 4pm EDT?
reasoning: The market is severely mispriced. Based on current data, the S&P 500 closed at 6,616.85 on April 7th and experienced massive gains today (April 8th) following Trump's Iran ceasefire announcement. With futures up 2-3% and the index already showing strong momentum from the geopolitical relief rally, reaching 6,925 by April 10th (just 2 days away) appears highly likely. The current level around 6,700-6,800 range needs only modest 2-4% additional gains over two trading days.
key_factors: Major relief rally today due to US-Iran ceasefire announcement
Futures up 2-3% indicating strong opening on April 8
Oil prices plummeting 17%+ reducing inflation concerns
Market needs only ~2-4% additional gains over next 2 days
Strong technical momentum and sentiment improvement
risks: Ceasefire could break down within the two-week window
Unexpected negative economic data or earnings
Only 2 trading days remaining creates timing risk
